semantic_description: In-place left rotation of an integer array by one position. The function requires n >= 1 and full ownership of an array a containing logical list l of length n. It saves l[0], shifts each element l[i+1] into position i using a for loop over 0 <= i < n - 1, then writes the saved first value into a[n-1]. The output array has the same length n and contains lr where lr[i] = l[i+1] for i < n-1 and lr[n-1] = l[0]. The function mutates the input array and does not allocate memory.
